---
title: "Syllabus"
subtitle: "My Course: A subtitle for my course"
author: "Prof. Jane Smith"
organization: "My University"
institute: "Institute of Something"
email: "jane.smith@university.edu"
course: "My Course"
term: "WS 2026"
lang: "en"
format:
  html: default
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    toc: false
    include-in-header: ../assets/latex/_handout-packages.tex
    template-partials:
      - ../assets/latex/before-body.tex
---

## Course Information

| | |
|---|---|
| **Course** | My Course |
| **Subtitle** | A subtitle for my course |
| **Semester** | WS 2026 |
| **ECTS** | 3 |
| **Language** | EN |
| **Institution** | My University |
| **Department** | Department of Something |

## Instructors


- **Prof. Jane Smith** (lecturer) — jane.smith@university.edu



## Schedule

- **Start:** 2026-10-01
- **End:** 2027-01-31
- **Weekly day:** Monday

## Modules

| # | Date | Title | 
|---|------|-------|
| 1 | 06.10.2026 | [Getting started](modules/intro.qmd) |
| 2 | 13.10.2026 | [Core concepts](modules/topic-a.qmd) |
| 3 | 20.10.2026 | [Hands-on exercises](modules/topic-b.qmd) |
